summary: To properly fill a large buccolingual cavity in a lower molar with amalgam, using the double wedge technique ensures adequate shaping while protecting nearby teeth. This method manages the extensive space more efficiently than single or other techniques. \boxed{\text{Double Wedge Technique}}
